hero.description: Horizon Tech d.o.o. ndi kampani yamakono yapadziko lonse lapansi yomwe ili ku Sarajevo, kupereka njira zothetsera mapulogalamu otsogola kwa makampani m'makontinenti atatu.

mission.title: Ntchito
mission.description: Timathandiza mabungwe kutembenuza malingaliro ofunitsitsa kukhala mankhwala odalirika a digito omwe amapanga phindu la bizinesi loyezeka.
points: Gwirizanitsani kupereka ukadaulo ndi zotsatira zomveka bwino zamalonda.
Pangani machitidwe a nthawi yayitali omwe amakhalabe osungidwa pamene magulu akukula.
Gwirizanani kwambiri ndi omwe akukhudzidwa kuchokera ku njira mpaka kuphedwa.

expertise.title: Ukadaulo
expertise.description: Magulu athu osiyanasiyana amaphatikiza kuya kwa zomangamanga ndi kuganiza kwa mankhwala kudutsa nkhokwe zamakono zamakono.
points: Zomangamanga zamtambo, makina a DevOps, ndi zomangamanga zolimba.
Kugwiritsa ntchito AI / ML, ntchito za deta, ndi mankhwala othandizira a IoT.

approach.title: Njira
approach.description: Timapha ndi chitsanzo chowonekera, cha iterative chomwe chimapangitsa kuti kupereka kukhale kodziwika bwino pamene kuchepetsa chiopsezo cha mankhwala.
points: Pezani: fotokozani kukula, zofunika kwambiri, ndi kupambana koyambirira.
Kumanga: sitima mu increments lolunjika ndi mosalekeza mayankho loops.
Optimize: yang'anirani zotsatira ndikuwongolera magwiridwe antchito pakapita nthawi.

cta.title: Takonzeka Kusintha Bizinesi Yanu?
cta.description: Lowani nawo mndandanda wokulirapo wa makampani omwe amakhulupirira Horizon Tech kuti apereke njira zatsopano ndi zotsatira zapadera.

hero.title: Lumikizanani nafe
hero.description: Kodi muli ndi polojekiti m'maganizo? Tikufuna kumva kuchokera kwa inu. Fikirani kuti mukambirane momwe tingathandizire kuti malingaliro anu akhale amoyo.

form.title: Titumizireni uthenga
form.success: Zikomo chifukwa cha uthenga wanu. Tidzabwerera kwa inu mkati mwa maola 24-48.
form.error: China chake chinalakwika. Chonde yesaninso kapena titumizireni imelo mwachindunji.
form.subject: Nkhani *

placeholders.name: Dzina lako
placeholders.subject: Kodi tingathandize chiyani?
placeholders.message: Tiuzeni za polojekiti yanu kapena kufunsa kwanu...

validation.email: Chonde lowetsani adilesi ya imelo yovomerezeka.
validation.messageMinLength: Uthenga uyenera kukhala ndi zilembo zosachepera {{count}} zazitali.

reasons: AI / ML ndi akatswiri a zomangamanga zamtambo
Kukula kwa Agile ndi kulumikizana kowoneka bwino

custom.title: Njira Zothetsera Mwambo
custom.description: Mukuyang'ana njira yothetsera vutoli? Timagwira ntchito limodzi ndi makasitomala kuti timvetsetse zosowa zapadera ndikupereka mapulogalamu amtundu womwe umayendetsa zotsatira zoyezeka.

faq.title: Kodi muli ndi mafunso ambiri?
faq.description: Onani gawo lathu la FAQ kuti mupeze mayankho mwachangu

hero.description: Gulu losiyanasiyana la akatswiri a zamakono, okonza mapulani, ndi akatswiri omanga zinthu zapamwamba za digito pamodzi.

section.title: Gulu la Utsogoleri
section.description: Atsogoleri odziwa bwino ntchito omwe akutsogolera masomphenya ndi kukula kwa Horizon Tech

hamza.bio: Mtsogoleri wamasomphenya ndi katswiri waukadaulo wokhala ndi zaka 10 + mu mapulogalamu ogwira ntchito, okhazikika mu AI / ML, nsanja zamtambo, ndi zomangamanga zowonongeka.

ahmet.bio: Katswiri wa cybersecurity amayang'ana pa zomangamanga zachitetezo cha bizinesi, zomangamanga zotetezeka pamalopo, komanso kutsatira-koyamba kupereka kwa malo olamulidwa.

culture.title: Moyo ku Horizon Tech
culture.description: Timalimbikitsa chikhalidwe cha zatsopano, mgwirizano, ndi kuphunzira kosalekeza

remoteFirst.title: Chikhalidwe Chakutali Choyamba
remoteFirst.description: Gwirani ntchito kuchokera kulikonse ndi maola osinthika ndikuyang'ana zotsatira, osati malo.

collaborative.title: Malo Ogwirizana
collaborative.description: Zochitika zamagulu nthawi zonse, magawo ogawana chidziwitso, ndi mgwirizano wogwira ntchito.

workLife.title: Kulinganizika kwa Ntchito ndi Moyo
workLife.description: Ndondomeko yowolowa manja ya tchuthi, chithandizo cha matenda a maganizo, ndi kulemekeza nthawi yaumwini.

innovation.title: Nthawi ya Innovation
innovation.description: Nthawi ya 20% ya ntchito zaumwini, hackathons, ndikufufuza matekinoloje atsopano.

cta.title: Mukufuna kulowa nawo gulu lathu?
cta.description: Nthawi zonse timayang'ana anthu aluso omwe amasamala za luso, umwini, ndi luso.

hero.description: Lowani ndi gulu la mainjiniya omanga mapulogalamu otsogola kwa makasitomala apadziko lonse lapansi. Gwirani ntchito kutali, kukula mosalekeza, ndikupanga zotsatira zenizeni.

process.title: Ndondomeko Yathu Yolemba Ntchito
process.description: Zowonekera, zogwira mtima, komanso zolemekeza nthawi yanu

steps.title: Gwiritsani ntchito
steps.description: Tumizani ntchito yanu ndipo tidzawunikanso mkati mwa masiku a bizinesi a 3.

steps.title: Macheza Oyamba
steps.description: Kuyimbira kanema kwa mphindi 30 kuti mukambirane zomwe mwakumana nazo komanso zomwe mukuyembekezera.

steps.title: Zaukadaulo
steps.description: Kuyankhulana kwaukadaulo kapena masewera olimbitsa thupi kuti muwonetse luso lanu.

steps.title: Kupereka
steps.description: Kumanani ndi gulu ndikulandila mwayi wanu kuti mulowe nawo Horizon Tech.

jobs.title: Maudindo otseguka
jobs.description: Pezani mwayi wanu wotsatira ndikulowa nawo gulu lathu lomwe likukula

listings.title: Injiniya Wamkulu Wathunthu
listings.description: Pangani mapulogalamu ogwira ntchito pogwiritsa ntchito matekinoloje a React, Node.js, ndi mtambo.

listings.title: Injiniya wa DevOps
listings.description: Pangani ndi kusunga mapaipi a CI / CD, zomangamanga monga code, ndi njira zowunikira.

listings.title: Injiniya wa AI / ML
listings.description: Pangani zitsanzo zophunzirira makina ndi njira za AI kwa makasitomala ogwira ntchito.

listings.title: Mlengi wa Mankhwala
listings.description: Pangani zochitika zokongola, zomveka bwino za ogwiritsa ntchito ntchito zovuta zamakampani.

listings.title: Njira Zothetsera Zomangamanga
listings.description: Pangani njira zamakono zothetsera mapeto ndikutsogolera makasitomala kudzera mu kusintha kwa digito.

listings.title: Wolemba Zaukadaulo
listings.description: Pangani zolemba zambiri, maphunziro, ndi ukadaulo.

cta.title: Mafunso okhudza kugwira ntchito pano?
cta.description: Tikufuna kumva kuchokera kwa inu. Fikirani ndipo tidzayankha mafunso aliwonse okhudza moyo ku Horizon Tech.

hero.description: Fufuzani momwe tathandizira makampani m'mafakitale onse kusintha ntchito kudzera mu teknoloji yothandiza, yapamwamba.

items.title: Kusamuka kwa Mtambo ndi Zamakono
items.description: Anasamutsa machitidwe akale a banki kupita ku zomangamanga zamtambo wa AWS ndi zero downtime.
items.challenge: Zomangamanga za monolithic zomwe zimayambitsa mavuto a scalability
items.result: Anasamukira bwinobwino ku microservices pa AWS

items.title: AI-Powered Diagnostic Platform
items.description: Anamanga zitsanzo za ML zosanthula zithunzi zachipatala ndi 95% + molondola.
items.challenge: Njira zowunikira pamanja zimatenga nthawi yayitali

items.title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
items.description: Anayamba BI nsanja processing 10M + zochitika tsiku ndi tsiku.
items.challenge: Palibe kuwonekera kwa nthawi yeniyeni mu ma metrics ofunikira a bizinesi

cta.title: Takonzeka Kulemba Nkhani Yanu Yopambana?
cta.description: Tiyeni tikambirane momwe tingakuthandizireni kukwaniritsa zotsatira zofanana ndikukula ndi chidaliro.

filters.title: Fyuluta ya Makampani
filters.empty: Palibe maphunziro a milandu omwe amafanana ndi fyuluta yosankhidwa ya makampani.

hero.description: Maphunziro aukadaulo, kuzindikira kwa makampani, ndi maphunziro othandiza kuchokera ku ntchito yeniyeni yoperekera.

featuredPost.title: Tsogolo la Chitukuko cha Mtambo: Zochitika Zowonera mu 2025
featuredPost.excerpt: Fufuzani zochitika zaposachedwa mu chitukuko cha mtambo, kuchokera ku zomangamanga zopanda seva kupita ku makompyuta a m'mphepete.

posts.title: Kumanga Scalable Microservices ndi Azure Kubernetes Service
posts.excerpt: Chitsogozo chothandiza pakupanga ndi kutumiza ma microservices pogwiritsa ntchito AKS.

posts.title: Kuphunzira Makina Pakupanga: Maphunziro Ophunzirira
posts.excerpt: Maphunziro oyesedwa m'munda kuchokera pakugwiritsa ntchito zitsanzo za ML pamlingo.

posts.title: Yankho la 19: Zomwe Zili Zatsopano ndi Chifukwa Chake Zili Zofunika
posts.excerpt: Kuzama kwambiri pazinthu za React 19 ndi zotsatira za ntchito.

newsletter.title: Lembetsani ku Nyuzipepala Yathu
newsletter.description: Pezani nkhani zaposachedwa, maphunziro, ndi chidziwitso choperekedwa mlungu uliwonse.

hero.title: Horizon Tech Engineering Blog
hero.description: Zolemba zam'munda ndi njira zothandiza kuchokera ku magulu omanga mankhwala a AI, machitidwe amakampani, ndi nsanja zodalirika zamtambo.

email.description: Titumizireni imelo kuti mufunse mafunso aliwonse

faqs.question: Kodi Horizon Tech imapereka ntchito ziti?
faqs.answer: Timapereka chitukuko cha mapulogalamu amtundu, njira za AI / ML, zomangamanga zamtambo, DevOps, nzeru zamalonda, ndi ntchito za IoT.

faqs.question: Kodi ndingayambitse bwanji polojekiti ndi Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Lumikizanani nafe kudzera pa fomu kapena imelo ndi zofuna zanu. Tidzakonza kuyitana kopeza ndikugawana malingaliro.

faqs.question: Kodi mumapereka chithandizo chopitilira ndi kukonza?
faqs.answer: Inde. Timapereka ma phukusi othandizira ndi kukonza omwe amaphatikizapo kukonza zolakwika, zosintha zachitetezo, ndi kusintha kwa zinthu.

education.title: Zida zaukadaulo
education.subtitle: Zitsogozo, maphunziro, ndi njira zabwino kuchokera ku gulu la Horizon Tech

hub.title: Malo Ophunzirira
hub.description: Fufuzani zipangizo zathu zamakono zomwe zakonzedwa pamtambo, AI / ML, DevOps, ndi mapulogalamu amakono.
hub.note: Zipangizozi zimachokera ku zochitika zenizeni za polojekiti ndipo zimasinthidwa nthawi zonse.

training.text: Mukufuna maphunziro a gulu la manja? Timapereka maphunziro amwambo pa zomangamanga zamtambo, DevOps, ndi njira zamakono zoperekera.
